# Dependency Map — Form 1040 Lines 13a and 13b (QBI + Schedule 1-A)

**Tax year:** 2025
**Last updated:** 2026-06-14 (re-authored against `lines/13ab.md`)

Line 13a is the **Qualified Business Income (QBI) deduction** (Form 8995 line 15 OR Form 8995-A line 39). Line 13b is the **new-for-2025 Schedule 1-A line 38 total** (tips + overtime + car loan interest + enhanced senior deduction). Per `lines/13ab.md` §1, both lines share a single dependency map because the 2025 compute order is **structurally coupled**: line 13a's taxable-income-before-QBI base subtracts line 13b, forcing **13b to finalize before 13a's authoritative pass**.

---

## 1. Computation identity

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Form 1040 labels | Line 13a (QBI deduction); Line 13b (Schedule 1-A additional deductions) |
| Formula — 13a | `line13a = Form8995.line15` OR `Form8995A.line39` |
| Formula — 13b | `line13b = Schedule1A.line38 = line13 + line21 + line30 + line37` |
| Backend method — 13a | `computeLine13a()` in `TaxReturnComputeService.java` (~line 5596 first-pass; ~line 1275 second-pass invocation) |
| Backend method — 13b | `computeSchedule1A()` in `TaxReturnComputeService.java` (~line 1132 call site) |
| Return type — 13a | `Line13AComputation` record (includes `Form8995` OR `Form8995A` model + clamp-to-zero metadata) |
| Return type — 13b | `Schedule1A` model object |
| Output models | `Form8995.java`, `Form8995A.java`, `Schedule1A.java`, `Deductions.java` |
| **Critical compute order** | **13b MUST be computed before 13a's authoritative pass** (see Section 3) |

---

## 2. Upstream inputs

### 2.1 Personal forms

| Form ID | Person | Key fields read |
|---|---|---|
| `qbi-deduction-taxpayer` | Taxpayer | `taxpayerHasQbiFromScheduleC`, `taxpayerHasQbiFromScheduleF`, `taxpayerHasQbiFromScheduleE`, `taxpayerHasK1QbiSources`, `taxpayerHasManualQbiAdjustment`, `taxpayerManualQbiAdjustmentAmount`, `taxpayerPriorYearQbiLossCarryforward`, `taxpayerPriorYearReitPtpLossCarryforward`, `isCooperativePatronOfAgriculturalHorticulturalCooperative`, `confirmAllReceivedQbiStatementsUploaded` |
| `qbi-deduction-spouse` | Spouse | Same fields with `spouse` prefix; null-shadowed on MFS via 13a #1 guard |
| `additional-deductions-taxpayer` | Taxpayer | Part II tips: `taxpayerReceivedQualifiedTips`, `taxpayerTippedOccupationConfirmed`, `taxpayerHasMultipleTipEmployers`, `taxpayerManualTipsFromNonStatementSources`, `taxpayerTradeTipsNetIncomeCap`. Part III overtime: `taxpayerReceivedQualifiedOvertime`, `taxpayerOvertimeFromW2Box1Amount`, `taxpayerOvertimeFromNonW2SourcesAmount`. Part IV car loan: `paidCarLoanInterestOnNewVehicle`, `carLoanVehicles[]` (per-vehicle: `vehicleLoanInterestPaidAmount`, `interestAlreadyDeductedOnSchedule{E,C,F}Amount`, `vehicleWasRefinanced`, `vehicleOriginalLoanPrincipal`, `vehicleRefinancedLoanBalance`, `vehicleVin`). Part V senior: `taxpayerBornBeforeJan2_1961`. MAGI add-backs: Form 2555 manual fallback fields, Form 4563 line 15 amount |
| `additional-deductions-spouse` | Spouse | `spouseReceivedQualifiedTips`, `spouseHasMultipleTipEmployers`, `spouseManualTipsFromNonStatementSources`, `spouseTradeTipsNetIncomeCap`, `spouseOvertimeFromW2Box1Amount`, `spouseOvertimeFromNonW2SourcesAmount`, `spouseBornBeforeJan2_1961`; null-shadowed on MFS via 13b #1 guard |
| `filing-status` | Return | Drives QBI threshold ($394,600 MFJ / $197,300 other), QBI phase-in range ($100k MFJ / $50k other), Schedule 1-A caps + phaseouts + MFJ-only gates |

### 2.2 Statement entries

| Statement type | Field(s) | How used |
|---|---|---|
| `1099-div` | `section199ADividendsAmount` (box 5), `recipientTIN` | QBI REIT/PTP component — SSN-matched aggregation per person |
| `k1-1065` | `section199AQualifiedBusinessIncomeAmount`, `section199AW2WagesAmount`, `section199AUbiaQualifiedPropertyAmount`, `section199AIsSstb`, `section199AQualifiedReitDividendsAmount`, `section199AQualifiedPtpIncomeAmount` | Form 8995-A per-activity QBI/REIT/PTP data; SSTB phase-in via applicable percentage |
| `k1-1120s` | Same 199A fields as k1-1065 | Form 8995-A per-activity data |
| `k1-1041` | Same 199A fields | QBI per-activity data |
| `w-2` | `socialSecurityTipsAmount` (box 7) | Part II tips raw — SSN-matched via `sumW2Box7TipsForSsn` |
| `1099-nec` | `nonemployeeCompensationAmount`, `isTipIncome`, `recipientTIN` | Part II trade tips — included when `isTipIncome=true` AND SSN matches; capped by `taxpayerTradeTipsNetIncomeCap` whenever non-null |
| `tip-income-taxpayer` / `tip-income-spouse` | Form 4137 line 4 unreported tips (computed) | Part II tips raw (via `computeForm4137()`) |

### 2.3 Upstream computed values

| Source | Field | How used |
|---|---|---|
| `computeAdjustments()` | `adjustments.line11bAmountFromLine11aAdjustedGrossIncome` | AGI for `taxableIncomeBeforeQbi` AND Schedule 1-A Part I MAGI base |
| `computeLine12()` → preliminary `computeLine13a` | `line12e` | `taxableIncomeBeforeQbi = AGI − line12e − line13b` (subtrahend) |
| `computeSchedule1A()` | `line13b` (Schedule 1-A line 38) | Subtracted from taxable income before QBI on second-pass |
| `computeForm2555Exclusions()` | `form2555.line45` (FEIE), `form2555.line50` (housing exclusion) | Schedule 1-A line 2b/2c MAGI add-backs (prefer computed; manual fallback) |
| `computeLine7a()` → `scheduleD` | `scheduleD.line15NetLongTermCapitalGainOrLoss` | QBI ceiling: `netCapitalGainAndQualifiedDividends = max(line15, 0) + qualifiedDividends` — **NOT line 7a** per spec §3.7 |

### 2.4 Reference data constants

| Constant | 2025 value | Used by |
|---|---:|---|
| `QBI_DEDUCTION_RATE` | 0.20 | 8995/8995-A 20% factor |
| `QBI_THRESHOLD_MFJ` | $394,600 | 8995 vs 8995-A routing |
| `QBI_THRESHOLD_ALL_OTHER` | $197,300 | 8995 vs 8995-A routing |
| `QBI_PHASEIN_RANGE_MFJ` | $100,000 | 8995-A phase-in band |
| `QBI_PHASEIN_RANGE_ALL_OTHER` | $50,000 | 8995-A phase-in band |
| `QBI_W2_LIMIT_RATE` | 0.50 | 8995-A W-2 wages limitation |
| `QBI_W2_LIMIT_ALTERNATIVE_WAGES_RATE` | 0.25 | 8995-A 25% W-2 + 2.5% UBIA path |
| `QBI_W2_LIMIT_ALTERNATIVE_UBIA_RATE` | 0.025 | 8995-A UBIA portion |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_TIPS_CAP` | $25,000 | Part II line 7 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_TIPS_PHASEOUT_SINGLE` | $150,000 | Part II/III line 9/17 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_TIPS_PHASEOUT_MFJ` | $300,000 | Part II/III line 9/17 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_TIPS_OVERTIME_STEP_AMOUNT` | $100 / $1k | Part II/III line 12/20 (ROUND DOWN) |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_OVERTIME_CAP_SINGLE` | $12,500 | Part III line 15 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_OVERTIME_CAP_MFJ` | $25,000 | Part III line 15 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_CAR_LOAN_CAP` | $10,000 | Part IV line 24 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_CAR_LOAN_PHASEOUT_SINGLE` | $100,000 | Part IV line 26 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_CAR_LOAN_PHASEOUT_MFJ` | $200,000 | Part IV line 26 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_CAR_LOAN_STEP_AMOUNT` | $200 / $1k | Part IV line 29 (★ ROUND UP CEILING) |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_SENIOR_BASE_PER_PERSON` | $6,000 | Part V line 35 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_SENIOR_PHASEOUT_SINGLE` | $75,000 | Part V line 32 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_SENIOR_PHASEOUT_MFJ` | $150,000 | Part V line 32 |
| `SCHEDULE_1A_SENIOR_PHASEOUT_RATE` | 0.06 (continuous) | Part V line 34 |

---

## 3. Compute order — critical two-pass dependency

```text
Step A-C: incomes → line9 → line10 → line11a → line11b (AGI)
Step D:   computeLine12()
            ├─ computes line12e (standard or itemized)
            └─ invokes computeLine13a() PASS 1 (line13b = null placeholder)
                 └─ sets PRELIMINARY line13a + PRELIMINARY line14 Site A + PRELIMINARY line15 Site alpha
Step E:   computeSchedule1A()
            └─ MAGI = AGI + Form2555.line45 + Form2555.line50 + Form4563.line15
               Part II tips → line13         (floor phaseout, MFJ-only when married)
               Part III overtime → line21    (floor phaseout, MFJ-only when married)
               Part IV car loan → line30     (ceil phaseout, NO MFJ-only)
               Part V senior → line37        (continuous 6%, MFJ-only when married)
               line38 = line13 + line21 + line30 + line37 → Form1040.line13b
            └─ writes INTERIM line14 Site B + INTERIM line15 Site beta
Step F:   computeLine13a() PASS 2 (line13b = final)
            └─ taxableIncomeBeforeQbi = AGI − line12e − line13b
               shouldUseForm8995A(status, taxIncBeforeQbi) → route to 8995 OR 8995-A
               8995: 20% × (QBI net of carryforward) + 20% × (REIT/PTP net of carryforward), capped by 20% × max(0, taxIncBeforeQbi − netCapGain − qualDiv)
               8995-A: per-activity SSTB + W-2/UBIA limit with phase-in fraction
            └─ AUTHORITATIVE line13a + line14 Site C + line15 Site gamma
               (OR Site D + Site delta when QBI blocked / cleared to null)
Step G-H: line14 = line12e + line13a + line13b → line15 = max(0, line11b − line14) → line16
```

The two-pass pattern is the **only correct compute order** because:
- 2025 Form 8995 line 11 / Form 8995-A taxable-income limitation uses `line11a − line12e − line13b`;
- using line 15 as the base would be **circular** (line 15 itself depends on line 13a);
- the 2024 single-pass approach would overstate QBI for taxpayers with large Schedule 1-A deductions.

Reference: 13a #5 two-pass breadcrumb at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:~1234`.

---

## 4. Downstream consumers

| Consumer | What it uses | How |
|---|---|---|
| Line 14 (inline at 4 sites) | `line13a` + `line13b` | `line14 = line12e + (line13a ?? 0) + (line13b ?? 0)` |
| Line 15 (inline at 5 sites) | `line14` | `line15 = max(0, line11b − line14)` |
| Line 16 — Tax | `line15` | Method selection (Tax Table, TCW, QDCG, Schedule D TW, FEITW, Form 8615) |
| Line 17 — AMT | `schedule1A.line37EnhancedSeniorDeduction` | Form 6251 line 1w **add-back** for senior deduction only (tips/OT/car loan NOT added back); implemented at `computeLine17` ~line 8093 |
| Form 8995 / 8995-A | Conditional attachment when `line13a > 0` | 8995 attached below threshold; 8995-A above threshold or cooperative patron |
| Schedule 1-A | Conditional attachment when `line38Total > 0` | Any Part II–V amount nonzero |
| `computeScheduleD()` | `line15TaxableIncome` | QDCG worksheet threshold comparisons |
| `computeForm8880()` | `line15TaxableIncome` (via AGI) | Saver's credit ceiling |
| `computeEicEarned()` | `line15TaxableIncome` | EIC phaseout |
| PDF export | `deductions.qualifiedBusinessIncomeDeduction` (13a), `deductions.additionalDeductions` (13b) | Form 1040 line 13a + 13b boxes |

---

## 5. Output fields produced

### `Deductions` object (partial)
```
qualifiedBusinessIncomeDeduction   → Form 1040 line 13a
additionalDeductions               → Form 1040 line 13b
totalDeductions                    → line 14 = line12e + line13a + line13b
line15TaxableIncome                → line 15 = max(0, AGI − line14)
```

### `Form8995` object
```
qualifiedBusinessIncomeAmount
priorYearQualifiedBusinessLossCarryforward
netQualifiedBusinessIncomeAfterCarryforward         (★ negative preserved for next-year storage)
qualifiedReitAndPtpAmount
priorYearReitPtpLossCarryforward
netQualifiedReitAndPtpAmount
tentativeQualifiedBusinessIncomeDeduction
taxableIncomeBeforeQualifiedBusinessIncomeDeduction
netCapitalGainAndQualifiedDividends                 (= max(SchedD.line15, 0) + qualDiv)
taxableIncomeLimitation
line15QualifiedBusinessIncomeDeduction              → Form 1040 line 13a (clamped >= 0)
```

### `Form8995A` object
Same fields as `Form8995` plus per-activity SSTB phase-in + W-2/UBIA limit details; emits `line39QualifiedBusinessIncomeDeduction → Form 1040 line 13a`.

### `Schedule1A` object
```
magi                                                (= line3)
line13TipsDeduction
line21OvertimeDeduction
line30CarLoanInterestDeduction
line37EnhancedSeniorDeduction                       (★ AMT add-back at Form 6251 line 1w)
line38Total                                         → Form 1040 line 13b
taxpayerSeniorEligible / spouseSeniorEligible
header (description)
```

---

## 6. Carryforward semantics (13a-specific)

If net QBI OR net REIT/PTP is **negative**:
- it does NOT create a current negative line 13a (clamped to 0 before 20% factor);
- the negative figure IS preserved on **Form 8995 line 4** (`netQualifiedBusinessIncomeAfterCarryforward`) so next-year carryforward import is correct;
- `Form1040.line13a >= 0` always (current-year clamp).

Dual semantic — **preserve-negative for next-year storage + clamp-to-zero for current-year deduction** — documented at 13a #8 with a ~30-line helper breadcrumb plus a 5-line cross-reference at the wiring site.

---

## 7. MFS protection (cascade orchestrators #16 and #17)

| Orchestrator | Call site | Guard |
|---|---|---|
| `computeLine13a()` (16th in cascade) | `prepare()` ~line 1275 (second-pass) | Null-shadows `qbiDeductionSpouse` on MFS; 13a #1 |
| `computeSchedule1A()` (17th in cascade) | `prepare()` ~line 1132 | Null-shadows `additionalDeductionsSpouse` + `form2555Spouse` on MFS; 13b #1 |

Both guards are first MFS guards OUTSIDE the 12abcde cluster. Without them, stale spouse-form data leaks into MAGI / QBI on returns that later switch to MFS.

Locked in by Java unit tests `mfsExcludesSpouseQbiFromLine13a` + `mfsExcludesSpouseForm2555FromSchedule1AMagi`.

---

## 8. Flags emitted

### Line 13a blocking flags

| Flag code | Blocking | Condition |
|---|---|---|
| `LINE13A_SELF_EMPLOYMENT_OUT_OF_SCOPE_TAXPAYER` | Yes | Schedule C/F QBI sources present (taxpayer) |
| `LINE13A_SELF_EMPLOYMENT_OUT_OF_SCOPE_SPOUSE` | Yes | Same for spouse |
| `LINE13A_MISSING_K1_1065_199A_DETAILS_TAXPAYER` | Yes | K-1 1065 uploaded but no §199A fields |
| `LINE13A_MISSING_K1_1065_199A_DETAILS_SPOUSE` | Yes | Same for spouse |
| `LINE13A_MISSING_K1_1120S_199A_DETAILS_TAXPAYER` | Yes | K-1 1120-S uploaded but no §199A fields |
| `LINE13A_MISSING_K1_1041_199A_DETAILS_TAXPAYER` | Yes | K-1 1041 uploaded but no §199A fields |
| `LINE13A_MANUAL_QBI_THRESHOLD_UNSUPPORTED` | Yes | Manual QBI adjustment used when above threshold |
| `LINE13A_NEGATIVE_K1_QBI_THRESHOLD_UNSUPPORTED` | Yes | Negative K-1 QBI above threshold (netting not supported) |
| `LINE13A_COMPLEX_QBI_THRESHOLD_UNSUPPORTED` | Yes | Above threshold with no K-1 activity details |
| `LINE13A_COOPERATIVE_PATRON_UNSUPPORTED` | Yes | `isCooperativePatronOfAgriculturalHorticulturalCooperative = true` |
| `LINE13A_STATEMENT_UPLOAD_REQUIRED_TAXPAYER` / `_SPOUSE` | Yes | QBI inputs present but `confirmAllReceivedQbiStatementsUploaded != true` |

### Line 13b blocking flags

| Flag code | Blocking | Condition |
|---|---|---|
| `SCHEDULE_1A_STATEMENTS_NOT_CONFIRMED_UPLOADED` | Yes | Schedule 1-A inputs present but statement-upload gate not confirmed (enforced upstream of `computeSchedule1A`) |

`computeSchedule1A()` itself emits no internal blocking flags.

---

## 9. Conditional attachments

| Form | When generated |
|---|---|
| Form 8995 | `line13a > 0` AND `taxableIncomeBeforeQbi ≤ threshold(filingStatus)` AND not a cooperative patron |
| Form 8995-A | `line13a > 0` AND (above threshold OR cooperative patron) |
| Schedule 1-A | `Schedule1A.line38Total > 0` (any Part II–V amount nonzero) |

---

## 10. Data-flow summary

```
[qbi-deduction-{taxpayer,spouse}]
  hasScheduleC/F/E QBI ─────► flag LINE13A_SELF_EMPLOYMENT_OUT_OF_SCOPE_*
  isCooperativePatron ──────► flag LINE13A_COOPERATIVE_PATRON_UNSUPPORTED
  priorYearQbiLossCarryforward ──► reduces current QBI
  priorYearReitPtpLossCarryforward ──► reduces REIT/PTP component
  manual adjustment (if above threshold) ──► flag LINE13A_MANUAL_QBI_THRESHOLD_UNSUPPORTED

[additional-deductions-{taxpayer,spouse}]
  Part II  tips inputs ────► Schedule1A.line13
  Part III overtime inputs ──► Schedule1A.line21
  Part IV  car loan inputs ──► Schedule1A.line30
  Part V   senior gate ────► Schedule1A.line37 (+ AMT add-back at Form 6251 line 1w)

[w-2.box7 + form 4137 + 1099-NEC tips + manual]
  SSN-matched aggregation ──► Part II raw tips

[1099-DIV box 5]
  SSN-matched ─────────────► QBI REIT/PTP component

[k1-{1065,1120s,1041} §199A]
  per-activity QBI / REIT / W-2 / UBIA / SSTB ──► Form 8995-A activity table

[computed Form 2555 (or manual fallback) + Form 4563]
  line45 + line50 + Form4563.line15 ──► Schedule 1-A line 2e MAGI add-back

PHASE 1 — computeSchedule1A():
  MAGI = AGI + add-backs
  Part II/III floor phaseout → line13 + line21
  Part IV  ceiling phaseout → line30      (NO MFJ-only)
  Part V   continuous 6%   → line37      (MFJ-only when married; AMT add-back)
  line38 = line13 + line21 + line30 + line37 → Form1040.line13b

PHASE 2 — computeLine13a() second-pass:
  taxableIncomeBeforeQbi = AGI − line12e − line13b
  → Form 8995 OR Form 8995-A → Form1040.line13a (clamped >= 0)

line14 = line12e + line13a + line13b
line15 = max(0, line11b − line14)
```
